channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I'm impressed that Microsoft keeps on improving PowerToys with smart additions — but I wonder why the newest monitor trick isn't in Windows 11 by default
item.description: Power Display is a smart add-on that's arrived in the PowerToys suite of utilities, accompanied by another equally useful tool.

item.title: Whoop will soon offer users in-app video consultations with licensed clinicians
item.description: Clinicians will be able to see users' health data.

item.title: Get ready for the whisper-filled office of the future
item.description: How will work setups change if we spend more and more time talking to our computers?
